title: redline config
description: redline is deterministic and local-first. It catches structural and high-signal prompt regressions plus obvious allow/deny wording flips; use requirements or an optional judge for factual correctness, tone, hallucination, and subtle reasoning risks.

$schema.description: JSON Schema URL for editor autocomplete.

suite.description: Path to the committed suite baseline generated by redline suite.

input_field.description: JSONL field path containing the prompt or input.

output_field.description: JSONL field path containing the response or output.

max_cases.description: Maximum number of representative suite cases to select.

timeout_seconds.description: Per-case replay timeout for redline eval.

workers.description: Number of replay cases redline eval may run concurrently.

diff_profile.description: Diff signal profile. strict treats missing numbers/entities as regressions; review downgrades them to changed signals for long-form assistant logs.

owners.description: Optional case ownership rules. First match wins. Use this to route regressions to teams in reports and GitHub annotations.

match.description: Substring or glob pattern to match.

owner.description: Owner handle or team, for example @billing-team.

field.description: Field to match. Defaults to any.

oneOf.description: Shortcut mapping of pattern to owner.

approval.description: Optional local approval guardrails for team baseline promotion.

require_approver.description: When true, redline accept requires --approver and records it in the suite and audit log.

fail_on.description: Statuses that produce a non-zero diff/eval exit. Use "none" for report-only mode.

json.description: JSON report path. {command} expands to diff or eval.

markdown.description: Markdown report path. {command} expands to diff or eval.

html.description: Self-contained HTML report path. {command} expands to diff or eval.

junit.description: JUnit XML report path. {command} expands to diff or eval.

observed.description: Local JSONL file where redline watch stores observed prompt-response rows.

candidate.description: Path where redline eval writes replayed candidate JSONL rows.

metadata.description: Path where redline eval writes replay metadata.

audit.description: Append-only JSONL audit log path for suite generation, eval/diff runs, judgments, requirements, and accepted baselines. Use false or "none" to disable.

replay.description: Command used by redline eval to run each case. The prompt is sent on stdin unless the command contains {prompt}.

judge.description: Optional judge command for ambiguous changed cases only.

judge_timeout_seconds.description: Per-case judge timeout when judge is configured as a string.
